features.description: Track binding-driven concrete ingress materialization for REST and JSON-RPC without transport-owned semantic dispatch.
features.title: Binding-driven REST and JSON-RPC ingress materialization

features.description: Track removal of HTTP path and JSON-RPC method matching from executors so they only execute compiled plans.
features.title: Executors do not perform transport matching

features.description: Track endpoint-keyed JSON-RPC binding identity, concrete endpoint mounting, and default endpoint ownership in tigrbl_core.
features.title: Endpoint-keyed JSON-RPC multiplexing

features.description: Track the return of transport lookup, endpoint resolution, and operation matching to the compiled KernelPlan and atom chain.
features.title: KernelPlan and atoms own transport lookup and matching

features.description: Track removal of app-local HTTP dispatch and other transport bypasses that avoid the kernel-owned dispatch path.
features.title: Remove non-conforming transport bypasses

features.description: Create the governed transport-dispatch track resources, boundary, validator, and setup evidence before implementation delivery starts.
features.title: Transport-dispatch governance track setup

features.description: Track restoration of REST and JSON-RPC semantic parity through the shared transport-dispatch path without test-only relaxation.
features.title: REST and JSON-RPC parity through the shared dispatch path
